chest.name: Quantum Chest
chest.description: One of an entangled pair. Shares its inventory with its partner, however far apart they are. If the partner is ever lost, this chest collapses out of existence - contents and all.
bigchest.name: Large Quantum Chest
bigchest.description: A roomier quantum chest. One of an entangled pair, sharing its inventory with its partner no matter the distance. If the partner is lost, this chest collapses out of existence - contents and all.
collapse.message: A quantum chest lost its entangled partner and collapsed out of existence - contents and all.
